budget.areas: Qianmen（前门） / Xidan（西单） / Dongsi（东四）

mid.desc: JI Hotel / Atour / Hilton Garden Inn
mid.areas: Wangfujing（王府井） / Sanlitun（三里屯） / Guomao CBD（国贸）

luxury.desc: The Peninsula / Waldorf Astoria / Four Seasons / Mandarin Oriental Wangfujing
luxury.areas: Wangfujing（王府井） / Guomao CBD（国贸） / Financial Street

beijing.tip: Stay inside the 2nd Ring Road for the easiest sightseeing access — Qianmen（前门）, Wangfujing（王府井）, and Dongsi（东四） are reliable picks.

budget.areas: People's Square（人民广场） / Nanjing East Road（南京东路）

mid.areas: The Bund（外滩） / Jing'an Temple（静安寺） / Huaihai Road（淮海路）

luxury.desc: Peace Hotel / The Peninsula / The Ritz-Carlton Pudong / W Hotel
luxury.areas: The Bund（外滩） / Lujiazui（陆家嘴） / Jing'an

shanghai.tip: For first-timers, People's Square（人民广场） or Nanjing East Road（南京东路） are the easiest bases; stay at The Bund（外滩） or Lujiazui（陆家嘴） for skyline views.

budget.areas: Chunxi Road（春熙路） / Tianfu Square（天府广场）

mid.areas: Chunxi Road（春熙路） / Kuanzhai Alley（宽窄巷子） / Wuhou Shrine（武侯祠）

luxury.desc: The Temple House / Grand Hyatt Chengdu / St. Regis / Waldorf Astoria
luxury.areas: Taikoo Li（太古里） / Chunxi Road（春熙路）

chengdu.tip: Chunxi Road（春熙路） is the most convenient base for sightseeing, and The Temple House is the city's standout boutique stay.

budget.areas: Bell Tower（钟楼） / South Gate（南门）

mid.areas: Bell Tower（钟楼） / Big Wild Goose Pagoda（大雁塔） / South Gate（南门）

luxury.desc: Sofitel Legend / Westin / Marriott Executive Apartments
luxury.areas: Bell Tower（钟楼） / Big Wild Goose Pagoda（大雁塔）

xian.tip: Stay around Bell Tower（钟楼） or inside the South Gate（南门） city wall for easy walks to the Muslim Quarter and the walls; Big Wild Goose Pagoda（大雁塔） is best if you want the fountain show nearby.

budget.areas: Tianhe / Beijing Road（北京路）

mid.areas: Tianhe / Zhujiang New Town（珠江新城）

luxury.desc: Four Seasons / Ritz-Carlton / Mandarin Oriental / Rosewood
luxury.areas: Zhujiang New Town（珠江新城） / Tianhe

guangzhou.tip: Zhujiang New Town（珠江新城） is the easiest all-round base, and the Canton Tower night view is excellent.

budget.areas: West Lake District / Wulin Square（武林广场）

mid.areas: around West Lake（西湖） / Lingyin（灵隐）

luxury.desc: Four Seasons Hangzhou at West Lake / Amanfayun / Banyan Tree / Relais & Châteaux
luxury.areas: West Lake Scenic Area（西湖景区） / Lingyin（灵隐）

hangzhou.tip: Boutique stays around West Lake feel more atmospheric than standard hotels; if the budget allows, Amanfayun is a signature experience.

budget.areas: City Center / Two Rivers & Four Lakes（两江四湖）

mid.areas: City Center / along the Li River（漓江）

luxury.desc: Shangri-La Guilin / Li River Boyin（漓江泊隐） / Banyan Tree Yangshuo
luxury.areas: East Bank of the Li River（漓江） / Yangshuo（阳朔）

guilin.tip: Yangshuo is usually a better overnight base than Guilin city proper, and guesthouses along the Yulong River offer the best atmosphere.

budget.areas: Luohu（罗湖） / Futian（福田）

mid.areas: Futian CBD / Nanshan（南山）

luxury.desc: Park Hyatt / St. Regis / Raffles / Grand Hyatt
luxury.areas: Futian（福田） / Nanshan（南山） / Luohu（罗湖）

shenzhen.tip: Futian CBD is the most central choice, while Nanshan works well if you want to stay near the tech parks and OCT.

budget.areas: Jiefangbei（解放碑） / Guanyinqiao（观音桥）

mid.areas: Jiefangbei（解放碑） / Jiangbeizui（江北嘴）

luxury.desc: Westin / InterContinental Raffles City / Niccolo / Novotel
luxury.areas: Jiefangbei（解放碑） / Jiangbeizui（江北嘴） / Nanbin Road（南滨路）

chongqing.tip: Jiefangbei（解放碑） is the most central base; choose Nanbin Road（南滨路） or Jiangbeizui（江北嘴） for the best night views.

budget.areas: inside the Old Town / Shuhe Ancient Town（束河古镇）

mid.areas: inside the Old Town / Shuhe（束河）

luxury.desc: Banyan Tree / Aman / Old Town boutique hotel
luxury.areas: Shuhe（束河） / beside the Old Town

lijiang.tip: Shuhe is quieter than Dayan Old Town, and the cobblestone lanes inside the old town are rough with luggage, so arrange a pickup with your host if possible.

budget.areas: Wulingyuan（武陵源） / Urban Area

mid.areas: Wulingyuan Main Gate（武陵源标志门）

luxury.desc: Harmona Resort Zhangjiajie / Nabalie（纳百利） / Holiday Inn
luxury.areas: Wulingyuan（武陵源）

zhangjiajie.tip: Staying near the Wulingyuan Main Gate gives you the easiest walk-in access to the park.

budget.areas: Guanqian Street（观前街） / Railway Station

mid.areas: Guanqian Street（观前街） / Pingjiang Road（平江路）

luxury.desc: Kempinski Hotel Suzhou Jinji Lake / Park Hyatt / Crowne Plaza Zhongyin
luxury.areas: Jinji Lake（金鸡湖） / Pingjiang Road（平江路）

suzhou.tip: Guesthouses around Pingjiang Road or Shantang Street feel the most classic Jiangnan, while Jinji Lake suits business stays better.

budget.areas: Xinjiekou（新街口） / Confucius Temple（夫子庙）

mid.desc: Atour / JI Hotel / Golden Eagle Hotel
mid.areas: Xinjiekou（新街口） / Xuanwu Lake（玄武湖）

luxury.desc: The Ritz-Carlton Nanjing / Yihe Mansion / Westin
luxury.areas: Xinjiekou（新街口） / Yihe Road（颐和路）

nanjing.tip: Xinjiekou is the most central base, while the Yihe Road villa district offers elegant Republican-era style stays.

budget.areas: Central Street（中央大街）

mid.areas: Central Street（中央大街） / Songbei（松北）

luxury.desc: Wanda Vista Harbin / Shangri-La / Sunac Songbei
luxury.areas: Central Street（中央大街） / Songbei（松北）

harbin.tip: Stay near Central Street for the easiest logistics; Saint Sophia Cathedral is walkable and there are convenient shuttle links to Ice and Snow World.

budget.areas: Jianghan Road（江汉路） / Hubu Alley（户部巷）

mid.areas: Jianghan Road（江汉路） / Chu River Han Street（楚河汉街）

luxury.desc: Wanda Reign Wuhan / Fairmont / Sheraton（泛海喜来登）
luxury.areas: Hankou Riverfront（汉口江滩） / Wuchang（武昌）

wuhan.tip: Jianghan Road is the most central base, while Optics Valley in Wuchang works well for student-friendly budgets.

budget.areas: Railway Station / Taidong（台东）

mid.desc: Atour / JI Hotel / Westin (entry room types)
mid.areas: May Fourth Square（五四广场） / Badaguan（八大关）

luxury.desc: The Lalu Qingdao / InterContinental Qingdao / Sea View Garden
luxury.areas: Badaguan（八大关） / Laoshan（崂山）

qingdao.tip: German-style guesthouses around Badaguan feel the most distinctive, but rates can double in peak summer.

budget.areas: Zhongshan Road（中山路） / Zengcuoan（曾厝垵）

mid.areas: Gulangyu（鼓浪屿） / Island Ring Road（环岛路）

luxury.desc: Conrad Xiamen / Lohkah Hotel & Spa（七尚） / Seaview Resort
luxury.areas: Gulangyu（鼓浪屿） / Island Ring Road（环岛路）

xiamen.tip: Zengcuoan guesthouses offer strong value; spending one night on Gulangyu is atmospheric, but moving luggage there is a hassle.

budget.areas: Dadonghai（大东海） / Urban Area

mid.areas: Sanya Bay（三亚湾） / Yalong Bay（亚龙湾）

luxury.desc: The EDITION Sanya / Capella / Park Hyatt / Banyan Tree
luxury.areas: Haitang Bay（海棠湾） / Yalong Bay（亚龙湾）

sanya.tip: Yalong Bay has the best sand, Haitang Bay has the newest luxury resorts, and Sanya Bay is best for sunsets; winter rates can easily double.

budget.areas: Wuyi Square（五一广场） / Taiping Street（太平街）

mid.areas: Wuyi Square（五一广场） / IFS

luxury.desc: Niccolo Changsha / St. Regis / Grand Hyatt / W Hotel
luxury.areas: Wuyi Square（五一广场） / along the Xiang River（湘江）

changsha.tip: Stay around Wuyi Square for the most central location, with Pozi Street and Taiping Street within walking distance.

budget.areas: Barkhor Street（八廓街） / Beijing Road（北京路）

mid.desc: Atour / Guesthouse / St. Regis (entry room types)
mid.areas: Barkhor Street（八廓街） / Potala Palace（布达拉宫）

luxury.desc: The St. Regis Lhasa Resort / InterContinental Lhasa Paradise / Shangri-La
luxury.areas: Barkhor Street（八廓街） / Potala Palace（布达拉宫）

lasa.tip: Do not shower on your first night in Lhasa if you're adjusting to the altitude; staying near Barkhor Street keeps both the kora route and Potala Palace close by.

budget.areas: Drum Tower District（鼓楼） / Dongjiekou（东街口）

mid.areas: Drum Tower District（鼓楼） / Three Lanes and Seven Alleys（三坊七巷）

luxury.desc: Hilton Fuzhou / Westin / Kempinski
luxury.areas: Drum Tower District（鼓楼） / north bank of the Min River（闽江）

fuzhou.tip: Guesthouses around Three Lanes and Seven Alleys feel the most like old Fuzhou.

budget.areas: Urban Area / Mingsha Mountain（鸣沙山）

mid.desc: Boutique stay / Guesthouse / Silk Road Yiyuan（丝路怡苑）
mid.areas: Urban Area

luxury.desc: Dunhuang Hotel（敦煌山庄） / Tianhe Hotel（天河酒店） / International Hotel
luxury.areas: Mingsha Mountain（鸣沙山） / Urban Area

dunhuang.tip: Desert camping near Mingsha Mountain is worth trying if you want a more memorable stay.

budget.areas: Xiguan（西关） / Zhangye Road（张掖路）

mid.desc: Atour / JI Hotel / Holiday Inn (entry room types)
mid.areas: Xiguan（西关） / along the Yellow River（黄河）

luxury.desc: Crowne Plaza Lanzhou / Great Wall Jianguo Hotel
luxury.areas: Yellow River Scenic Line（黄河风情线）

lanzhou.tip: Xiguan Crossroads is the most convenient base, with Zhengning Road Night Market within walking distance.

budget.areas: Old Town / Xigong（西工）

mid.desc: Atour / JI Hotel / Peony City Hotel（牡丹城）
mid.areas: Old Town / Luolong（洛龙）

luxury.desc: Huayang Plaza Luoyang / Mudu Lihao（钼都利豪） / Marriott
luxury.areas: Luolong（洛龙） / New District

luoyang.tip: Stay in Luolong if Longmen Grottoes is your priority; the Old Town is more convenient for Luoyang Water Banquet restaurants.

budget.areas: Tangkou Town（汤口镇） / Tunxi（屯溪）

mid.areas: Tangkou Town（汤口镇） / Hongcun（宏村）

luxury.desc: Banyan Tree Huangshan / Hanyuelou（涵月楼） / Crowne Plaza Yucheng（昱城皇冠）
luxury.areas: Hongcun（宏村） / Tunxi（屯溪）

huangshan.tip: Stay in Tangkou Town for hiking Yellow Mountain; choose a Hongcun guesthouse if you want classic Anhui architecture.

budget.areas: Yunyan（云岩） / Penshuichi（喷水池）

mid.areas: Yunyan（云岩） / Jiaxiu Tower（甲秀楼）

luxury.desc: Hyatt Regency Guiyang Zhongtian / Sofitel / Renaissance
luxury.areas: Guanshanhu（观山湖） / Yunyan（云岩）

guiyang.tip: Stay in Yunyan District or near Jiaxiu Tower for the easiest access to the city core and Erqi Road snack street.

budget.areas: Honggutan（红谷滩） / Bayi Square（八一广场）

mid.areas: Honggutan（红谷滩） / Pavilion of Prince Teng（滕王阁）

luxury.desc: Ligao Crowne Plaza（力高皇冠） / Qianhu Hotel / Sheraton
luxury.areas: Honggutan（红谷滩）

nanchang.tip: Hotels in Honggutan are newer, while the Old Town is better if you want easy access to mixed noodles and clay-pot soup spots.

budget.areas: Chengzhong District（城中区） / Mojia Street（莫家街）

mid.areas: Chengzhong District（城中区） / Haihu（海湖）

luxury.desc: Sofitel Xining / Wanda Realm / Hilton
luxury.areas: Haihu New District

xining.tip: Stay in Chengzhong District for easy access to Mojia Street, and overnight in Xining before an early Qinghai Lake departure.

budget.areas: Drum Tower District（鼓楼） / Zhongshan West Road（中山西路）

mid.desc: Atour / JI Hotel / Shangri-La (entry room types)
mid.areas: Drum Tower District（鼓楼） / Ruyi（如意）

luxury.desc: Shangri-La Hohhot / Sheraton / Marriott
luxury.areas: Ruyi（如意） / New City District

hohhot.tip: Stay near Gulou for the easiest access to Mongolian restaurants; most grassland trips start from Hohhot.

budget.areas: inside the Old Town / Caicun（才村）

mid.areas: Dali Ancient Town（古城） / by Erhai Lake（洱海）

luxury.desc: Yihe Yunxi（颐和耘熹） / Mingyue Songjian（明月松间） / Hainer（海纳尔）
luxury.areas: Erhai Lake（洱海） / Dali Ancient Town（古城）

dali.tip: Stay inside Dali Ancient Town for energy and nightlife, or by Erhai Lake for a quieter sunrise stay.

budget.areas: park entrance（沟口） / Zhangzha Town（漳扎镇）

mid.areas: park entrance（沟口）

luxury.desc: Banyan Tree Jiuzhaigou / Howard Johnson Tianyuan / Hilton
luxury.areas: park entrance（沟口）

jiuzhaigou.tip: Staying at the park entrance is the most convenient for walking into Jiuzhaigou, but autumn room rates can double.
